name: ospf-single-area
description: Three Cisco routers in a line, all in OSPF area 0, configured to demonstrate single-area OSPFv2: the network-statement method (R1, R3) and the interface method (R2), passive LAN interfaces, an OSPF-advertised default route from the edge (R1), and verification of adjacencies, routes, and cost. Companion lab for the single-area OSPF configuration article.
